data.title: Crypto czar Sacks says this country is next— right after China
data.description:
David Sacks blasts Ukraine aid, sparks backlash as U. S. slaps 104% tariff on China, sending yuan to record low.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/crypto-czar-sacks-says-this-country-is-next-right-after-china

data.title: Ripple dumps XRP to pump RLUSD — still 0.2% the size of USDT
data.description:
Ripple is selling over a billion dollars worth of cash, equity, and XRP tokens to fund an acquisition that it hopes will boost RLUSD volumes. The post Ripple dumps XRP to pump RLUSD — still 0.
source: https://protos.com/ripple-dumps-xrp-to-pump-rlusd-still-0-2-the-size-of-usdt/

data.title: Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan Predicts Mag 7 Corporate Treasuries Begin Rapid Accumulation of Bitcoin – Here’s Why
data.description:
Bitwise chief investment officer Matt Hougan says that corporate buying of Bitcoin (BTC) is most likely about to explode.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/08/bitwise-cio-matt-hougan-predicts-mag-7-corporate-treasuries-begin-rapid-accumulation-of-bitcoin-heres-why/

data.title: 52% of Crypto Holders in Singapore Use It for Payments of Goods and Services: Reports
data.description:
Singapore is emerging as a leader in cryptocurrency adoption, with digital currencies becoming increasingly practical for payments, especially among tech-savvy youth. Growing transaction volumes and a supportive regulatory environment are driving this trend.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/52-of-crypto-holders-in-singapore-use-it-for-payments-of-goods-and-services-reports/

data.title: Canary Sui ETF Inches Closer Towards Launching in US
data.description:
Canary Capital last month filed for a SUI exchange-traded fund. Now, Cboe has filed for a 19b-4 rule change that would allow it to trade.
source: https://decrypt.co/313893/cboe-sui-etf-sec

data.title: Crypto News: Panic Sets In, But Top Analyst Says the Big Picture Looks Bright
data.description:
Cryptocurrency markets have entered a period of heightened fear as financial markets react to uncertainty surrounding tariffs and monetary policy. Crypto news cycle as well remains largely in a bearish tone. Despite the turbulence, analyst Dan Gambardello points out that Bitcoin is holding relatively strong at around $78,000
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/08/crypto-news-panic-sets-in-but-top-analyst-says-the-big-picture-looks-bright/

data.title: U.S. Treasury Yield Curve Reaches Steepest Level Since 2022
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the yield curve spread between the U.S. two-year and ten-year Treasury bonds has widened to 48 basis points. This marks the steepest level since May 2022. The change in the yield curve is significant as it often reflects investor sentiment and economic expectations.

data.title: Justin Sun Calls Out Seven Sins by First Digital Trust
data.description:
Justin Sun said First Digital Trust has misappropriated over $500 million in TUSD reserves through unauthorized transfers and falsified records, and launched a $50 million bounty program to recover the funds and expose alleged fraud, laundering, and regulatory violations.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/justin-sun-calls-out-seven-sins-by-first-digital-trust/

data.title: Bitcoin Dumps As US Slaps China With Whopping 104% Tariffs
data.description:
Trump is waiting to hear from China before the tariffs take effect, though negotiations with the country are not being prioritized, other admin officials say.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/bitcoin-dumps-as-us-slaps-china-with-whopping-104-tariffs/

data.title: BNB Drops Below 550 USDT with a 0.45% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 08, 2025, 17:23 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 550 USDT and is now trading at 549.960022 USDT, with a narrowed 0.45% decrease in 24 hours.
